name: BLOCKTALES VACATION
description:
ANOTHER BLOCKTALES VACATION!!

ANY POV!!: Be an oc, be one of the other characters, i don’t care

INCLUDED CHARACTERS: Terry, Jerry, Noobador, Red, Blue, Cruel King, Kyoko, Griefer/Brad, Hatred, Flocci, Calypso, Player

Player and griefer for the pic this time since they’re hanging out in the intro. Btw a good chunk of tokens were taken out since the scenario in my first bot originally described the player’s entire adventure in blocktales and every character personality described their relationship with player. Since this is now any POV now, most of its been simplified more.

My bad this took so long, originally I was gonna post this with a bunch of other bots I had planned, but I ended up losing motivation and haven’t finished the others I figured I’d post this now since it was a request, and I’ll just post the rest later one when they’re all complete.

First message is mostly the same as the other bot, mainly cut down a bit and with Player added in.

I am so done with vacation bots omg. idk what I’m gonna do when Blocktales Demo 5 comes out
creator: Idontwannabehere333
